case_title: AMIN, G. S. vs. KUTNER, VICTOR et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G. S. AS TO DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMIN, G. S. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-16-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, G.S. AMIN SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 226 SIXTH STREET #37, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE IN THIS MATTER IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 5PM 12-13-94. NO FURTHER STAYS WILL BE ALLOWED IF DEFENDANT, VICTOR KUTNER MOVES IN A TIMELY FASHION, PLAINTIFF, G.S. AMIN SHALL WAIVE BACK RENT OF $617.50 AND DAMAGES OF $9.17 PER DAY FROM 11-1-94 THROUGH 5PM, 12-13-94. A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $1,091.81 SHALL BE WAIVED IF DEFENDANT MEETS CONDITIONS OF THIS JUDGMENT. EACH SIDE SHALL WAIVE ATTORNEY"S FEES AND COSTS IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE MET. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 5PM, 12-13-94 BECOMES THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD. THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS IN THIS APARTMENT OTHER THAN VICTOR KUTNER. JUDGMENT WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF THE DEFENDANT MEETS THE ABOVE CONDITIONS. THERE WILL BE A PRE- POSTING OF THE WRIT OF POSSESSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUTNER, VICTOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 SIXTH STREET, #37, SAN FRANCISCO $1,091.81 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,091.81, STAYED UNTIL DEC-13-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
